One shared Google Drive source of truth for Aureon grant operations, application tracking, evidence, communications, and next actions.
Codex/Aureon is acting as grant-ops operator and drafting assistant. Gary Leckey remains the legal company director and approval authority.
Clear company compliance blocker, then prepare 2 to 3 high-fit applications instead of scattering effort across every possible call.
Companies House shows the confirmation statement due 2026-05-09 as overdue. Resolve before submitting competitive bids where possible.
Aureon is positioned as a local-first evidence OS for AI, fintech, logistics automation, research validation, and controlled live operations.
Use strong but defensible language. Separate verified software capability, public research claims, and speculative research hypotheses.
No external submission, legal representation, filing, payment, or email send should happen without Gary approval.

column1: Gary Leckey remains the legal director and approval authority. This file makes the grant process uniform; it does not transfer legal authority, sign anything, send email, file accounts, or submit grants by itself.
